response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth across multiple domains, extensive experience in developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, frameworks), and clear leadership through workshops and open-source projects, but lacks explicit evidence of people management, organizational change leadership, or mobile platform expertise — key requirements for this role.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience building developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, code generators)
Proven technical leadership via open-source projects and knowledge-sharing workshops
Broad stack expertise including mobile (iOS/TV), build systems, and high-performance infrastructure
concerns: No clear evidence of formal people management or team leadership experience
Mobile platform experience is limited to iOS app maintenance, not ecosystem-wide tooling
Lacks documented experience leading organizational change or strategic roadmap planning
